# PHAssetEditOperation.delete

**Case**

The asset can be deleted from the photo library.

## Declaration

```swift
case delete
```

## Discussion

To delete one or more assets, create a change request with the [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHAssetChangeRequest/deleteAssets(_:)] method inside a [doc://com.apple.photokit/documentation/Photos/PHPhotoLibrary] change block.

## Constants

- **PHAssetEditOperation.content**: The asset’s photo or video content can be edited.
- **PHAssetEditOperation.properties**: The asset’s metadata properties can be edited.
